title: 1205 Sierra Village Way, San Jose, CA 95132 | Infinite Views Bay Area
meta_description:
Welcome to this spacious 2-bedroom, 2.5-bath end-unit townhome in the desirable Berryessa neighborhood of North San Jose. Filled with natural light, the home offers an open, flowing layout with vaulted ceilings and a cozy living room fireplace.

The updated kitchen features shaker-style cabinetry, granite countertops, and laminate flooring that extends into the main living areas. Step outside to a large private patio—perfect for relaxing, dining, or entertaining guests. A convenient half bath is located on the main level.
Upstairs, the expansive primary suite boasts vaulted ceilings and an en-suite bath with dual vanities, granite counters, and a glass-enclosed walk-in shower. A generously sized guest bedroom, updated hall bath, and an upstairs laundry area add everyday convenience. Skylights enhance the home’s bright and airy feel.

Additional highlights include a two-car attached garage, guest parking, and access to community amenities such as a pool, clubhouse, and green space.

Ideally located near major commuter routes including I-680, Capitol Expressway, light rail, and the Berryessa BART station. Enjoy close proximity to shopping at Costco, H Mart, Target, and The Great Mall, as well as nearby outdoor destinations like Penitencia Creek Park, Alum Rock Park, and Sierra Vista Open Space Preserve.

Don’t miss this fantastic opportunity to own in one of North San Jose’s most convenient locations!
